news_text: Experts have confirmed that gravity will stop working for two hours next week due to a rare planetary alignment. Citizens are advised to stay indoors to avoid floating into the sky.

The Reserve Bank of India announced that it will review interest rates after assessing inflation trends and economic growth indicators. Officials stated that the decision will be based on current market conditions and financial stability requirements.

Officials stated that the program will encourage investment, create employment opportunities, and reduce dependence on imports. The initiative is expected to support the growth of the electronics and technology sectors in the coming years.
